title: Ottawa 'very seriously' considering age restrictions for social media, AI chatbots
description: The federal heritage minister says the government is "seriously considering" whether to restrict young Canadians' access to social media platforms and artificial intelligence chatbots — but hasn't reached a decision yet.
content:
